title: ipomoea barteri var. barteri
intro: Ipomoea barteri var. barteri, also known as the African morning glory, is a climbing plant species that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, Ipomoea barteri var. barteri has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its medicinal properties which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the affected area.
